tool_purpose: A powerful web mapping tool that creates a structured map of website URLs, allowing you to discover and analyze site structure, content organization, and navigation paths. Perfect for site audits, content discovery, and understanding website architecture.

allow_external.description: Whether to allow following links that go to external domains

categories.description: Filter URLs using predefined categories like documentation, blog, api, etc

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the crawler

limit.description: Total number of links the crawler will process before stopping

max_breadth.description: Max number of links to follow per level of the tree (i.e., per page)

max_depth.description: Max depth of the mapping. Defines how far from the base URL the crawler can explore

select_domains.description: Regex patterns to select crawling to specific domains or subdomains (e.g., ^docs\.example\.com$)

select_paths.description: Regex patterns to select only URLs with specific path patterns (e.g., /docs/.*, /api/v1.*)

url.description: The root URL to begin the mapping

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The root URL to begin the mapping

arguments.name: max_depth
arguments.description: Max depth of the mapping. Defines how far from the base URL the crawler can explore

arguments.name: max_breadth
arguments.description: Max number of links to follow per level of the tree (i.e., per page)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Total number of links the crawler will process before stopping

arguments.name: instructions
arguments.description: Natural language instructions for the crawler

arguments.name: select_paths
arguments.description: Regex patterns to select only URLs with specific path patterns (e.g., /docs/.*, /api/v1.*)

arguments.name: select_domains
arguments.description: Regex patterns to select crawling to specific domains or subdomains (e.g., ^docs\.example\.com$)

arguments.name: allow_external
arguments.description: Whether to allow following links that go to external domains

arguments.name: categories
arguments.description: Filter URLs using predefined categories like documentation, blog, api, etc
